name: Z-Axis Nuclear Depth Measurement
description: You are a cell biologist investigating nuclear morphology. Determine the Z-axis thickness (depth) of a nucleus from the HeLa cell Z-stack located at ~/ImageJ_Data/raw/HeLa_stack/. Generate a resliced cross-section of a nucleus to measure its vertical height. Save the measurement to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/nucleus_depth.csv and the resliced image to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/nucleus_reslice.tif. Ensure the recorded measurement represents the Z-depth (vertical axis) of the nucleus.
